prompt: A refined anime-style luxury department store perfume counter scene, vertical composition, showing exactly 2 adult women from the waist up to mid-thigh in a softly lit upscale cosmetics boutique with glossy black-and-gold displays. On the right is a poised female beauty advisor with dark brown hair in a neat low bun, wearing small gold earrings, a tailored black suit jacket with a gold nameplate, and a professional elegant posture. The beauty advisor is demonstrating fragrance by holding a clear rectangular perfume bottle with a gold cap in one hand and gently applying or presenting scent to the customer’s wrist with the other hand; the customer extends one arm forward and looks attentively at the interaction. The setting includes exactly 2 visible black signboards with gold frames reading “LES PARFUMS DE LUXE,” one large sign on the back display and one smaller tabletop sign in the foreground. Behind them are illuminated shelving units with multiple luxury perfume bottles arranged in neat rows, with glass, gold trim, and warm beige interiors. In the foreground, include exactly 2 prominent perfume bottles on the right-side counter and a small bouquet of white flowers on the left edge. Use a polished high-end fashion illustration look, soft realistic anime rendering, elegant adult women, premium cosmetics-ad atmosphere, warm ambient lighting, subtle reflections on glass and marble, shallow depth of field, clean composition, and sophisticated feminine mood.
